positive: A mystical and highly detailed silhouette of a deep forest scene, framed by a swirling cosmic nebula and glowing celestial bodies. The composition is central and balanced, featuring bioluminescent flora (moss, glowing mushrooms) and elegant forest fauna silhouetted against a vibrant, deep-space backdrop. Strong contrast is key: obsidian black silhouettes against glowing teal, violet, and soft gold light. The style is a blend of intricate botanical illustration and graphic vector art, designed specifically for clean, scalable apparel printing. Volumetric lighting, maximal detail, symmetrical composition, print-ready artwork.
negative: blurry, noise, artifacts, grain, low quality, watermark, text, signatures, poor anatomy, extra limbs, disfigured, cartoon, ugly, amateur drawing, bad lines, washed out, gradient wash
